name: codex-gemini
description: Use Gemini CLI from Codex for broad codebase analysis, review, and synthesis tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate broad codebase analysis to Gemini CLI
interface.longDescription: Gemini lets Codex hand large cross-file analysis tasks to the local Gemini CLI. Use it for architecture reviews, refactor impact analysis, security sweeps, documentation synthesis, and structured data review when one large-context pass is useful.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $gemini-integration for a broad codebase analysis or review pass.
